description: Boundary tests verifying no cross-family relationship leakage when a second disconnected family is loaded

boundary-no-sibling-crossing.description: With both families loaded, adam and mike must NOT be siblings (they share no parent).

boundary-no-grandchild-crossing.description: adam must NOT have any grandchild belonging to the boundary family (mike/sue/tom/lucy/nina).

boundary-no-hasRelative-crossing.description: hasRelative is the root super-property of every family relationship. No member of the main family (adam…zeus) should be inferred as a hasRelative of any boundary-family member (mike, sue, tom, lucy, nina).
boundary-no-hasRelative-crossing.query: PREFIX : <http://example.org/kinship#> SELECT ?p ?q WHERE { ?p :hasRelative ?q . FILTER(?p IN (:adam,:eva,:azura,:antoine,:abel,:ada,:bob,:carol,:helen,:fiona,:zela,:carl,:david,:eliza,:frank,:grace,:re,:hathor,:hera,:zeus) && ?q IN (:mike,:sue,:tom,:lucy,:nina)) }
